## Summary

Describe the change and the learning or maintenance problem it solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Content
- [ ] Question bank or flashcards
- [ ] Lab or case study
- [ ] CLI or automation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance or security

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/check_content.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Current product or policy claims use authoritative public sources
- [ ] Local links were checked
- [ ] No secrets or confidential data were added

## Exam integrity

- [ ] This contribution is original.
- [ ] It does not include recalled, reconstructed, leaked, purchased, or proprietary exam or course content.

## Sources and notes

List relevant sources and any assumptions.
